name: ARRAY DIGITAL INFRASTRUCTURE, INC.
business: Array connects America through digital infrastructure by leasing tower space to tenants and providing ancillary services. As of December 31, 2025, Array owns 4,450 towers in 19 states. Array also holds noncontrolling interests in primarily wireless operating companies and holds certain wireless spectrum licenses.

exposures.sentence: Array connects America through digital infrastructure by leasing tower space to tenants and providing ancillary services.
With 4,450 cell towers, Array enables the deployment of 5G and other wireless technologies throughout the country.

catalysts.event: Closing of the sale of certain AWS, Cellular and PCS spectrum to Verizon
catalysts.sentence: Spectrum Licenses Buyer: Verizon; Purchase Price: $1,000,000; Signing Date: October 17, 2024; Estimated or Actual Close Date: Q2/Q3 2026.

catalysts.event: Closing of the sale of certain 700 MHz spectrum to T-Mobile
catalysts.sentence: Spectrum Licenses Buyer: T-Mobile; Purchase Price: $85,000; Signing Date: August 29, 2025; Estimated or Actual Close Date: 2026.

catalysts.event: Closing of the sale of certain 600 MHz spectrum to T-Mobile
catalysts.sentence: Spectrum Licenses Buyer: T-Mobile; Purchase Price: $86,387; Signing Date: October 7, 2025; Estimated or Actual Close Date: 2026.
